title: Thai-Style Kenyan Braai Chicken
description: A unique Thai-inspired dish featuring Kenyan braai spices and grilled chicken, served with a side of floral flaky flatbread.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Kenyan Braai Spice Blend and flour. Dust the chicken breasts with the spice mixture.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the floral flaky flatbread on the grill or in a toaster.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the chicken with toasted flatbread, garnished with chopped cilantro, a squeeze of lime juice, and a drizzle of honey.
Season with flaky sea salt to taste.
